title: The Universal Embedder app - embed any publicly available link anywhere
excerpt:
Our new app Universal Embedder is now available on the monday marketplace and is ready for your feedback. 
Universal Embedder allows you to embed any publicly available URL or item link directly inside of monday items, b…

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our new app Universal Embedder is now available on the monday marketplace and is ready for your feedback.

Universal Embedder allows you to embed any publicly available URL or item link directly inside of monday items, boards, workspaces and dashboards.


That means links to:

Google calendars
Microsoft Office 365 files
Google Sheets / Google Docs, Google Slides
Canva designs
Figma files
Dropbox links
Loom videos
Social media posts (Instagram, Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok)
Websites
YouTube videos
…and any other publicly available embeddable link.

All with one single embedding app.

1600×752 133 KB

We support any document type, including spreadsheets, documents, PDFs and slides, from any cloud storage provider (Google Drive, Dropbox, Box, OneDrive etc.).

And you can embed them all over monday, including as:

  • Item Views
  • Board Views
  • Dashboard Widgets
  • Workspace Embeds.

1600×749 164 KB

There’s a 14 day free trial so you can try it out with no strings attached. And we also have a forever free plan for up to 2 users. Here’s a walkthrough video to help you get started.

For monday-approved NGOs we offer 50% off all annual plans. Contact us at universal-embedder@easyappshq.com to get the discount before you subscribe.

Any feedback or missing features - let us know! We’d love to hear from you.

Ronen @ Easyapps

posts.author: jodisegal (Jodi Segal)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to put multiple links into one column? Or do I need to create a new column for each link? I’d like to create a profile for nonprofit clients and link to their website, their linkedin, etc.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @jodisegal,

If the question is regarding the column of type “link” in a monday board, each column value must be one link only.

Let us know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias
